message:
chore: Remove deprecated cm.ts entry point

The cm.ts file was an early alias/symlink for the CLI entry point.
With the full Commander implementation in cass-memory.ts, this
redundant file is no longer needed.

The canonical entry point is now:
- src/cass-memory.ts (primary CLI with Commander)
- package.json bin entries handle 'cm' alias

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
